de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.findprefix

Interface Checker

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AntecChecker, AntecSuccPrefixChecker, SuccChecker, TopLevelChecker

    interface Checker
    Interface for prefix checkers. Each checker is called on initialisation, on every operator of the prefix starting with the outermost operator and for getting the result.
    Author:
    christoph

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void checkOperator(Operator op, PIOPathIterator it)
      Called on every operator of the prefix starting with the outermost operator.
      boolean getResult()
      Called to get the result of the prefix check.
      void initPrefixCheck(PosInOccurrence pos)
      Called on initialisation of the prefix check.

    • Method Detail

      • initPrefixCheck

        void initPrefixCheck(PosInOccurrence pos)
        Called on initialisation of the prefix check.
        Parameters:
        pos - the initial position of occurrence

      • checkOperator

        void checkOperator(Operator op,
                   PIOPathIterator it)
        Called on every operator of the prefix starting with the outermost operator.
        Parameters:
        op - the operator to be checked
        it - the prefix iterator

      • getResult

        boolean getResult()
        Called to get the result of the prefix check.
        Parameters:
        pos - the initial position of occurrence
